concerns.text: SC-005 ('completing the full analysis pipeline... within 6 hours') is not explicitly anchored to any User Story. While it relates to the overall system performance, it does not trace to US-1, US-2, or US-3. It should either be anchored to a specific story (e.g., 'See US-1' if it's an extraction constraint) or removed if it is a general infrastructure constraint not covered by a specific user story.

The 'Edge Cases' section describes three specific system behaviors (handling empty responses, missing ratings, skewed distributions) that are not explicitly covered by any Functional Requirement (FR) or User Story. These behaviors are critical for robustness but lack a corresponding FR-NNN or explicit 'See US-N' anchor. They should be formalized as FRs (e.g., FR-006, FR-007, FR-008) and anchored to the relevant User Stories (likely US-1 and US-2).
